# Common TCP ports ranked by real-world observed frequency (most common
# first), derived from nmap's nmap-services data file
# (https://github.com/nmap/nmap/blob/master/nmap-services).
#
# NOTICE: this ranking data is (C) Insecure.Com LLC, distributed under
# the Nmap Public Source License (NOT this project's MIT license) —
# see https://svn.nmap.org/nmap/LICENSE. Retained here by project
# choice; review NPSL compatibility before redistributing exfil under
# terms that assume everything in the tree is MIT-licensed.
#
# One port per line, no blanks or comments below this header.
# `exfil scan --ports common` slices the top N entries from this list,
# where N is the scan plugin's 'top-ports' setting (default 100; see
# `exfil plugin config scan`).
